---
title: "12-Month Processing Map"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    theme: null
    highlight: null
    css: null
---
```{=html}
<style>
body { background:#f5f0e8; font-family:'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif; margin:0; padding:0; }
.page-header {
  background:#1e3a2a; color:#f0e8d0; padding:32px 48px 24px;
  border-bottom:3px solid #c4721a; margin-bottom:0;
}
.page-header h1 { font-size:36px; margin:0 0 6px; }
.page-header p  { font-size:13px; color:#b0a888; margin:0; }
.controls {
  background:#faf6ee; border-bottom:1px solid #d4c8a8;
  padding:12px 48px; position:sticky; top:0; z-index:100;
  box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}
.controls label { font-size:11px; color:#8a7d60; text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:1px; margin-right:8px; }
.controls select { padding:4px 10px; border-radius:16px; border:1.5px solid #d4c8a8;
  font-size:12px; background:#fff; color:#1a1a14; cursor:pointer; }
.main { max-width:1300px; margin:0 auto; padding:24px 48px 64px; }
.section-header {
  font-size:22px; font-weight:700; color:#1e3a2a;
  border-bottom:2px solid #1e3a2a; padding-bottom:8px;
  margin:32px 0 12px;
}
.cards-grid {
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr));
  gap:16px;
}
.variety-card {
  background:#faf6ee; border:1px solid #d4c8a8; border-radius:6px; padding:14px;
}
.card-name  { font-weight:700; font-size:14px; color:#1a1a14; margin-bottom:2px; }
.card-cat   { font-size:10px; color:#8a7d60; text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:1px; margin-bottom:10px; }
.chart-area { width:100%; }
.bars-row   { display:flex; width:100%; height:72px; align-items:flex-end; gap:1px; }
.bar-wrap   { flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; }
.bar-fill   { width:100%; border-radius:2px 2px 0 0; min-height:2px; }
.dots-row   { display:flex; width:100%; height:14px; align-items:center; gap:1px; margin-top:2px; }
.dot-cell   { flex:1; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; }
.demand-dot { background:#c4721a; border-radius:50%; }
.labels-row { display:flex; width:100%; gap:1px; margin-top:3px; }
.month-lbl  { flex:1; text-align:center; font-size:8px; color:#aaa; }
.legend     { display:flex; gap:20px; flex-wrap:wrap; padding:10px 0 4px;
  font-size:11px; color:#6a6050; }
.legend-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; }
.legend-swatch { width:14px; height:14px; border-radius:2px; }
.legend-dot-ex { width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%; background:#c4721a; }
</style>
```
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)

marty <- read_excel("cleaned_compiled_marty_data.xlsx")
cs    <- read_excel("clint and serena data cleaned.xlsx")
tt    <- read_excel("tulip tree data combined.xlsx")

marty <- marty %>%
  mutate(
    date           = as.Date(date),
    month_num      = month(date),
    total_quantity = as.numeric(total_quantity),
    total_price    = as.numeric(total_price),
    price_per      = ifelse(total_quantity > 0, total_price / total_quantity, NA)
  )

cs <- cs %>%
  mutate(
    date           = as.Date(date),
    month_num      = month(date),
    price_per      = as.numeric(gsub("\\$", "", price_per)),
    total_quantity = as.numeric(total_quantity)
  )

tt <- tt %>%
  mutate(
    date      = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30"),
    month_num = month(date),
    cleaned_product_name = tolower(trimws(paste0(
      product_category,
      ifelse(!is.na(product_type),     paste0(" - ", product_type),     ""),
      ifelse(!is.na(product_specific), paste0(" - ", product_specific), "")
    ))),
    total_quantity = as.numeric(total_quantity)
  )

supply_monthly <- marty %>%
  filter(!is.na(cleaned_product_name)) %>%
  group_by(cleaned_product_name, product_category, month_num) %>%
  summarise(
    supply    = sum(total_quantity, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_price = mean(price_per,     na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

demand_monthly <- bind_rows(
  cs %>% filter(!is.na(cleaned_product_name)) %>%
    group_by(cleaned_product_name, month_num) %>%
    summarise(demand = sum(total_quantity, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop"),
  tt %>% filter(!is.na(cleaned_product_name)) %>%
    group_by(cleaned_product_name, month_num) %>%
    summarise(demand = sum(total_quantity, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
) %>%
  group_by(cleaned_product_name, month_num) %>%
  summarise(demand = sum(demand, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")

full_grid <- supply_monthly %>%
  left_join(demand_monthly, by = c("cleaned_product_name","month_num")) %>%
  mutate(demand = replace_na(demand, 0))

MONTHS <- c("Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun",
            "Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec")
```
```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <h1>Marty's Market — 12-Month Processing Almanac</h1>
  <p>Supply volume · Price intensity (bar color) · Consumer demand (amber dots)</p>
</div>

<div class="controls">
  <label>Category:</label>
  <select id="catFilter" onchange="filterCards(this.value)">
    <option value="all">All Categories</option>
  </select>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;
  <span class="legend">
    <span class="legend-item">
      <span class="legend-swatch" style="background:linear-gradient(#1e5a2a,#6ab87a)"></span>
      Bar height = supply volume; darker = higher price
    </span>
    <span class="legend-item">
      <span class="legend-dot-ex"></span>
      Dot = consumer demand (size = volume)
    </span>
  </span>
</div>

<script>
function filterCards(cat) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.variety-card').forEach(el => {
    el.closest('.card-slot').style.display =
      (cat === 'all' || el.dataset.category === cat) ? '' : 'none';
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.section-header').forEach(el => {
    const grid = el.nextElementSibling;
    if (!grid) return;
    const anyVisible = [...grid.querySelectorAll('.card-slot')]
      .some(s => s.style.display !== 'none');
    el.style.display = anyVisible ? '' : 'none';
    grid.style.display = anyVisible ? '' : 'none';
  });
}
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const sel = document.getElementById('catFilter');
  const cats = new Set();
  document.querySelectorAll('.variety-card').forEach(el => cats.add(el.dataset.category));
  [...cats].sort().forEach(c => {
    const opt = document.createElement('option');
    opt.value = c; opt.textContent = c;
    sel.appendChild(opt);
  });
});
</script>
```
```{r render_cards, results='asis'}
cat('<div class="main">\n')

categories <- full_grid %>%
  distinct(product_category) %>%
  arrange(product_category) %>%
  pull(product_category)

for (catname in categories) {

  cat_varieties <- full_grid %>%
    filter(product_category == catname) %>%
    pull(cleaned_product_name) %>%
    unique() %>% sort()

  cat(sprintf('<div class="section-header">%s</div>\n<div class="cards-grid">\n', catname))

  for (v in cat_varieties) {

    vdata <- data.frame(month_num = 1:12) %>%
      left_join(
        full_grid %>% filter(cleaned_product_name == v) %>% arrange(month_num),
        by = "month_num"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        supply    = replace_na(supply,    0),
        avg_price = replace_na(avg_price, 0),
        demand    = replace_na(demand,    0)
      )

    max_supply <- max(vdata$supply,    1)
    max_price  <- max(vdata$avg_price, 1)
    max_demand <- max(vdata$demand,    1)

    bars <- dots <- labels <- ""

    for (i in 1:12) {
      s  <- vdata$supply[i]
      p  <- vdata$avg_price[i]
      d  <- vdata$demand[i]

      h     <- if (s > 0) max(3, round(log1p(s) / log1p(max_supply) * 100)) else 0
      pr    <- if (max_price > 0) p / max_price else 0
      col   <- sprintf("rgb(%d,%d,%d)",
                       round(30  + (1-pr)*120),
                       round(90  + (1-pr)*90),
                       round(42  + (1-pr)*20))
      ds    <- if (d > 0) max(4, min(13, round(d / max_demand * 13))) else 0

      bars <- paste0(bars, sprintf(
        '<div class="bar-wrap"><div class="bar-fill" style="height:%dpx;background:%s;"></div></div>',
        h, col))
      dots <- paste0(dots, sprintf('<div class="dot-cell">%s</div>',
        if (ds > 0) sprintf(
          '<div class="demand-dot" style="width:%dpx;height:%dpx;"></div>', ds, ds) else ""))
      labels <- paste0(labels,
        sprintf('<div class="month-lbl">%s</div>', MONTHS[i]))
    }

    cat(sprintf(
'<div class="card-slot">
  <div class="variety-card" data-category="%s">
    <div class="card-name">%s</div>
    <div class="card-cat">%s</div>
    <div class="chart-area">
      <div class="bars-row">%s</div>
      <div class="dots-row">%s</div>
      <div class="labels-row">%s</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>\n',
      catname, v, catname, bars, dots, labels))
  }

  cat('</div>\n')
}

cat('</div>\n')
```
